title: If you are the carry, staying alive is part of your macro job
body: When your lead is the main thing holding the game together, your life becomes a macro resource. Dying is no longer just a mechanical mistake; it can remove the only pressure source your team still has. Protecting that lead is part of carrying, not a sign of fear.
actionables: If your team depends on your lead, lower the amount of coinflip fights you take.
Judge risky plays by how much game state disappears if you die, not only by whether the combo could work.
Review losing throws by asking whether one death erased the only stable win condition on your team.

source.title: Jugar asi me convirtio en la mejor camille de europa (te enseno como lo hice)
source.notes: Built from the repeated idea that once fed, dying once can decide the game because the whole team relies on your pressure.
